title: U.S. Bank Increases Prime Lending Rate to 8.50 Percent
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) announced it has increased its prime lending rate to 8.50 percent from 8.25 percent, effective tomorrow, July 27, 2023, at all U.S. Bank locations. The prime lending rate replaces the reference rate formerly used by MUFG Union Bank, National Association. About U.S. Bancorp: U.S. Bancorp, with approximately 77,000 employees and $681 billion in assets as of June 30, 2023, is the parent company of U.S. Bank National Association. The Minneapoli.

title: Strong Large-Cap Insider Buys: Q2 2023
text: After bringing you the second quarter installment covering mid-cap corporate insider activity, today's piece article will cover on the latest insider activity within the large-cap stock range. Insiders at Enphase Energy, Axon Enterprise, ONEOK, Inc., U.S. Bancorp, and Tyson Foods have shown unusual interest in their own companies' stocks, buying large amounts in the second quarter. Other notable insider purchases include the Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund's $1.84 billion purchase of Lucid Group and Berkshire Hathaway's doubling down on Occidental Petroleum.

title: U.S. Bancorp names Evamarie Schoenborn CEO of U.S. Bancorp Investments, UnionBanc Investment Services, PFM Fund Distributors
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--U.S. Bancorp today announced that Evamarie Schoenborn is its new chief executive officer of U.S. Bancorp Investments Inc. (USBI), UnionBanc Investment Services (UBIS), and PFM Fund Distributors (PFMFD). Schoenborn's appointment was effective June 30. Both U.S. Bancorp Investments and UnionBanc Investment Services offer retail brokerage, investment advisory and insurance services.
